description.value:
Prerequisite: True Red Eyes, Intimidate 15 ranks, Strong Mind, Strong Body +2.

Benefit: As a swift action up to twice a day, you can spend a meta-chakra charge to gain a +2 bonus to your Red Eyes and Strong Mind, Strong Body abilities, a 10 foot increase to your Swiftness ability and gain the ability to Sense Chakra as a free action each round without requiring concentration. While active, a glowing red cross appears on your back, and your eye turns blood red, with a white pupil. Lasts 2 rounds.
